ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case #284211 (Estate of Wilkie C. Courter).

Appearances: John Cullen for Wilkie Courter (Petitioner on the Courter matter). Burton McGovern for Wilkie Courter (Petitioner on the Simpers matter).

Mr. McGovern stated that the petition for Final Distribution had been filed for the Simpers matter, but that the Court changed the order from Final Distribution to Preliminary Distribution. In addition, he stated that he responded to the Examiner's notes, that he would not be able to obtain all receipts as one of the beneficiaries was deceased and that the decedent's Counsel was medically unable to communicate. Furthermore, he stated that the Son was waiving commissions on the father's estate and that Mr. Cullen and himself were sharing the attorney's fees of $2,800.00. The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order).

With regard to the Courter matter, the Court was informed that a new petition for final distribution was going to be filed. The matter was continued to June 11, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Obi.

MINI MINUTES: John Cullen and Burton McGovern appearing for executor. Court did not get the status report. Mr. Cullen provided a copy to the Court. Court's concerns addressed. Mr. Cullen requested for continuance to claim escheated property before closing the estate. Matter is continued to 1/22/08.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Lee.
